symptoms.symptom_name: Accidental duplicate dosing across two furosemide strengths plus overlapping gliclazide and metformin

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Admitted double-dosing after a regimen change is the direct mechanism of the acute decompensation.
Duplicated gliclazide is the specific exposure that makes prolonged hypoglycaemia likely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dizziness markedly worse on standing, unable to stand or walk (orthostatic intolerance)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: diuretic-induced volume depletion with orthostatic hypotension
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Postural dizziness after double diuretic dosing is the expected picture of intravascular volume depletion.
Confusion in a diabetic on a duplicated sulfonylurea is a hypoglycaemia flag until a glucose reading proves otherwise.
Delirium from hypotension/hypoperfusion and drug effects also fits the toxicity picture.

symptoms.symptom_name: New bilateral pitting peripheral oedema to mid-calf

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Peripheral oedema reflects the underlying heart failure; video-observable and caregiver-reportable, but severity/pitting depth needs in-person confirmation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hypotension BP 90/55 with tachycardia HR 105 and a significant postural drop

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: diuretic-induced volume depletion with orthostatic hypotension
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective hypotension, tachycardia and postural drop are sealed clinician measurements; the AI Doctor can only infer circulatory compromise from the reported inability to stand, not a measured BP.

investigation_details.expected_result: Not available in the source note; must be measured urgently to exclude sulfonylurea hypoglycaemia
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A prolonged sulfonylurea hypoglycaemia could be missed and progress to seizure, coma or death.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A glucose measurement is the single test that confirms or excludes the most dangerous immediately-reversible possibility; not obtainable in real time by chat unless the home has a validated glucometer.

symptoms.symptom_name: Renal function panel and HbA1c (baseline disease control)

investigation_details.expected_result: Recent HbA1c and renal-function panel to establish baseline control and detect acute kidney injury
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Undetected AKI raises metformin lactic-acidosis risk and mis-guides diuretic/hypoglycaemic re-dosing.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: diuretic-induced volume depletion with acute kidney injury
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Renal-function bloods are needed to grade over-diuresis and safely re-prescribe; a hospital/pathology investigation, never available in real-time telehealth.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: acute iatrogenic polypharmacy toxicity with orthostatic hypotension and possible hypoglycaemia
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Double-dosing + inability to stand + new confusion + measured hypotension together point to a reversible iatrogenic crisis needing urgent hands-on reconciliation and a glucose check.
